item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, ini tidak berarti hak individu tidak penting—saya melihat kebutuhan untuk menemukan keseimbangan yang tepat antara dua prinsip tersebut.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that collective or societal interests often receive priority in Indonesia, but repeatedly adds that individual rights cannot be ignored and ends with a balance frame. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, grounding democracy and social justice in individual freedom, with little visible concession. Indonesian is understandable, though Agent B has minor language artifacts such as "dipbangun" and "participatory governance".
